tasks.label: [W] 🟢 Start Engine — Phase 8 dual-scanner (Trend + S&D MeanRev)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  Start the RBOTZILLA Phase 8 trading engine.' && echo '  Phase 8: Regime-free | Trend + S&D MeanRev dual-scanner' && echo '  Native OANDA trailing stops | Calibrated notional sizing' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) bash scripts/start.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [W] 🔴 Stop Engine — Kills the running engine process
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  Kill the running trading engine process.' && echo '  Open trades remain on OANDA. Broker-side OCO + native TS' && echo '  remain active as safety net even while engine is stopped.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) bash scripts/stop.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [W] 🔄 Restart Engine — Stops then starts (no code changes)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  1. Kill the running engine process' && echo '  2. Re-launch with current .env config (unchanged)' && echo '  3. Re-sync all broker positions + restore cooldowns' && echo '  NO code or config is modified.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) bash scripts/restart.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [W] 🔥 Insert Phoenix ENV — Swaps .env to Phoenix config (auto-backup + rollback)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  1. AUTO-BACKUP current .env with timestamp' && echo '  2. SWAP .env to .env.phoenix' && echo '  3. Restart engine with Phoenix config' && echo '  ROLLBACK: Run Restore Clean ENV task.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) mkdir -p logs/env_rollback && cp .env "logs/env_rollback/.env.backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)" && cp .env.phoenix .env && echo '✅ .env swapped to Phoenix config' && bash scripts/restart.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [W] 🛡️ Insert Safe ENV — Swaps .env to conservative config
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  1. AUTO-BACKUP current .env' && echo '  2. SWAP .env to .env.safe (conservative settings)' && echo '  3. Restart engine' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) mkdir -p logs/env_rollback && cp .env "logs/env_rollback/.env.backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)" && cp .env.safe .env && echo '✅ .env swapped to Safe config' && bash scripts/restart.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [W] ♻️ Restore Clean ENV — Restores master .env from Desktop backup
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  1. AUTO-BACKUP current .env' && echo '  2. RESTORE .env from Desktop master backup' && echo '  3. Restart engine' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && if [ ! -f ~/Desktop/RBOTZILLA_ENV_CLEAN_MASTER.env ]; then echo '  ❌ Master backup not found. Run: cp .env ~/Desktop/RBOTZILLA_ENV_CLEAN_MASTER.env' && exit 1; fi && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) mkdir -p logs/env_rollback && cp .env "logs/env_rollback/.env.backup_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)" && cp ~/Desktop/RBOTZILLA_ENV_CLEAN_MASTER.env .env && echo '✅ .env restored from Desktop master' && bash scripts/restart.sh ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [RO] 📜 LIVE TAIL — Narration Events (narration.jsonl)
tasks.command: tail -f /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN/logs/narration.jsonl | python3 -c "import sys,json; [print(json.dumps(json.loads(l), indent=None)) for l in sys.stdin]" 2>/dev/null || tail -f /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN/logs/narration.jsonl

tasks.label: [RO] 👀 Watch Live — Opens 3 panels side by side
[RO] 🏥 Health Check — Process + broker + narration status
[W] 🔒 Lock All Code — Sets .py/.sh to read-only (chmod 444)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL set ALL .py/.sh to read-only (444).' && echo '  Running engine is NOT affected.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN -name '*.py' ! -path '*/logs/*' -exec chmod 444 {} \; && find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN -name '*.sh' ! -path '*/logs/*' -exec chmod 444 {} \; && echo '✅ Locked (444)' ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [W] 🔓 Unlock All Code — Sets .py/.sh to writable (chmod 644/755)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL set .py to 644 and .sh to 755.' && echo '  Enables agent code editing and patching.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN -name '*.py' ! -path '*/logs/*' -exec chmod 644 {} \; && find /home/rfing/RBOTZILLA_OANDA_CLEAN -name '*.sh' ! -path '*/logs/*' -exec chmod 755 {} \; && echo '✅ Unlocked (644/755)' ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [W] 🔍 Reassess Trades — Runs TradeManager cycle (can modify SL on open trades)
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL run a full TradeManager cycle.' && echo '  CAN modify stop-loss on open trades (green-lock, trail, stagnation).' && echo '  Same logic engine runs every 60s automatically.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) .venv/bin/python scripts/reassess_trades.py ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [RO] 📊 System Status — All Features ON/OFF Dashboard
[W] 📸 Snapshot + Git Push — Backup current state and push to GitHub
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK WILL:' && echo '  1. Create a dated SNAPSHOT_BACKUP folder' && echo '  2. Copy all engine files into it' && echo '  3. Git commit + push to GitHub (origin main)' && echo '  Safe — does NOT restart the engine or modify .env.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Proceed? (Y/N/Exit): ' choice && case "$choice" in [yY]) SNAP="SNAPSHOT_BACKUP_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M)" && mkdir -p "$SNAP" && cp -r engine strategies brokers foundation util scripts .vscode "$SNAP/" 2>/dev/null && echo "✅ Snapshot: $SNAP" && git add -A && git commit -m "Phase 8 $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M') — regime-free dual-scanner, native TS, calibrated notional" && git push origin main && echo '✅ Pushed to GitHub' ;; [eE]|[eE][xX][iI][tT]) echo '  Exited.' ;; *) echo '  Cancelled.' ;; esac

tasks.label: [W] 🗑️ Close Single Trade — Close one trade by ID
tasks.command: echo '' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  ⚠️  THIS TASK closes ONE trade by ID at market price.' && echo '  Find the Ticket # in your OANDA platform Trades tab.' && echo '═══════════════════════════════════════════════════' && echo '' && read -p '  Enter trade ID (or Exit): ' tid && case "$tid" in [eE]*) echo '  Exited.' ;; '') echo '  No ID entered.' ;; *) python3 -m venv --system-site-packages /tmp/rbot_venv 2>/dev/null; /tmp/rbot_venv/bin/pip install websocket-client -q 2>/dev/null; /tmp/rbot_venv/bin/python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from brokers.oanda_connector import get_oanda_connector; c = get_oanda_connector(); r = c.close_trade('$tid'); print('RESULT:', r.get('success'), '| Status:', r.get('status_code'))" ;; esac
